narrative:
Delaware Twp (precinct in Defiance County) has 883 registered voters, with 48.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.8 percentage points.
